change_summary: Lazy-load the settings screens so the initial account bundle ships less JavaScript.
critical_invariants: Settings routes still render with no functional regression after lazy-loading.
Initial bundle no longer includes the settings chunk.
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Cut initial load on the account screens (NFR performance).
Implemented: React.lazy + Suspense boundaries around settings routes; bundle analyzer confirms the chunk split.
Not implemented: prefetch-on-hover still pending review feedback
repo_gates: cd frontend && yarn build [result=pass; attribution=clean] - build ok, settings chunk split

self_review_cycles.findings: routes render with Suspense fallback; no functional regression
chunk-load error boundary retries; graceful fallback
initial bundle -38KB gzip; verified via analyzer
core split complete; prefetch is a review nice-to-have
